entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br., the crop studied for genetic diversity analysis

entities.description: A quantitative trait used to assess genetic divergence among inbred lines

entities.name: DAYS TO 50 PER CENT FLOWERING
entities.description: A trait identified as important in the first principal component

entities.description: A trait identified as important in PC1 and contributing maximum towards genetic divergence

entities.description: A trait identified as important in both PC1 and PC2

entities.name: FRESH STOVER YIELD PER PLANT

entities.name: DRY MATTER YIELD PER PLANT
entities.description: A trait identified as important in PC1 and PC2 and contributing maximum towards genetic divergence

entities.name: GRAIN HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: A trait identified as important in PC1 and contributing positively to the first four principal components

entities.name: 1000 GRAIN WEIGHT
entities.description: A trait contributing maximum towards genetic divergence in cluster analysis

entities.name: PRODUCTIVE TILLERS PER PLANT
entities.description: A trait contributing maximum towards genetic divergence in cluster analysis

entities.name: HIERARCHICAL CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to group inbred lines into clusters to assess genetic divergence

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A dimensionality-reduction method used to identify principal components and assess genetic divergence

entities.name: HYBRIDIZATION PROGRAMME
entities.description: A breeding process where specific clusters of inbred lines are used to produce better segregants

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERGENCE
entities.description: The degree of genetic difference among inbred lines of pearl millet

entities.name: INBRED LINES
entities.description: Lines including maintainer (B-) and restorer (R-) lines used in the study

entities.name: HETEROTIC RESPONSE
entities.description: The superior performance of hybrids resulting from the cross of genetically divergent lines

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: The overall study to assess genetic variation among pearl millet inbred lines
